yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_TrueConf_zeroday_vulnerability_exploited {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for TrueConf zero-day vulnerability exploited to target government networks"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-APT-22" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "TrueConf" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_The_Identity_Paradox_The_Hidden_Risks_in {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for The Identity Paradox: The Hidden Risks in Your Valid Credentials"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-09" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Italian_spyware_vendor_creates_Fake_What {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Italian spyware vendor creates Fake WhatsApp app, targeting 200 users"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-09" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "WhatsApp" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Cisco_Smart_Software_Manager_Vulnerabili {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Cisco Smart Software Manager Vulnerability Let Attackers Execute Arbitrary Comma"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Apple_Expands_iOS_1877_Update_to_More_De {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Apple Expands iOS 18.7.7 Update to More Devices to Shield Users from DarkSword E"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "DarkSword" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Microsoft_Details_Steps_to_Mitigate_the_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Microsoft Details Steps to Mitigate the Axios npm Supply Chain Compromise"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-09" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE20264347__MW_WP_Form__510__Unauthenti {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-4347 - MW WP Form <= 5.1.0 - Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Move via mo"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-4347" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 120 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 117 as HIGH risk. 40 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-CYB-01, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

key_recommendations.recommendation: Address 40 CISA KEV-listed vulnerabilities under active exploitation
Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
key_recommendations.impact: Provides layered detection coverage for identified TTPs

key_recommendations.recommendation: Conduct threat hunting exercises based on generated hunt hypotheses
key_recommendations.impact: Proactive identification of undetected compromise indicators
